title: tetracarpidium conophorum
intro: Tetracarpidium conophorum, also known as the African walnut or bush mango, is a tropical plant native to West Africa, particularly in the countries of Nigeria and Cameroon. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tetracarpidium conophorum include the relief of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of this plant include its seeds, which can be crushed and used as a powder, or made into an oil or extract, and its leaves, which can be used to make a tea or decoction.
